Document:
# Notices, Bans, and Ban Durations [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2026-02-27[/italic][/color]
For more details, see the ban policy https://docs.spacestation14.com/en/community/admin/wizards-den-banning-policy.html
You may request a ban for yourself for any reason and duration. Self-requested bans are uncounted on your ban record, overidden by other bans, and lifted on request.
## Notices ### Note Notes record info of admin interest about you.
### Warning Notes that warn you of problematic behaviour preceding a ban. [color=SlateGray](Not all rule breaks have warnings.)[/color]
## Bans ### Role Ban Role bans prevent you from selecting and joining banned jobs or roles. [color=SlateGray](Switching to or acting as the banned role or job in a round is ban evasion.)[/color]
### Server Ban Server bans prevent you from connecting to all Wizard's Den servers.
## Ban Durations ### Temporary Bans that lift after a duration of time or accepted appeal. [color=SlateGray](To check your remaining ban duration, hover over the banned job and role for role bans or connect to the server for server bans.)[/color]
### Indefinite Bans that lift after an accepted appeal. [color=SlateGray](Bans without durations are indefinite by default.)[/color]
### Voucher Indefinite bans whose appeal requires either: - A six-month wait from the time of the ban and voucher of good behaviour from another server's admins. - Proof of misjudgement.
### Permanent Indefinite bans whose appeal requires proof of misjudgement.
